# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zone (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a Public Cloud VM Instances availability zone, by `id` or by `name`.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve an availability zone by name.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zone" "az1" {
  name = "fr1-az01"
}

# Or by id.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zone" "by_id" {
  id = "18eea4f6-b4a1-40c1-8435-457ee7a9ab8e"
}

# The zone id is what a VM instance deploys into.
output "az_id" {
  value = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zone.az1.id
}

output "az_compatible_families" {
  value = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_availability_zone.az1.compatible_families
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the availability zone to retrieve. Conflicts with `name`.
- `name` (String) The name of the availability zone to retrieve (e.g. `fr1-az01`). Conflicts with `id`.
- `region_id` (String) The ID of the region, used to narrow the search when looking up by `name`. Populated with the zone's region on read.

### Read-Only

- `compatible_families` (List of Object) The instance families available in this availability zone. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--compatible_families))
- `created_at` (String) The creation date of the availability zone (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) The human-readable description of the availability zone.
- `is_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the availability zone is enabled for the tenant.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update date of the availability zone (RFC3339).

<a id="nestedatt--compatible_families"></a>
### Nested Schema for `compatible_families`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
